steps.observed: Clipboard mock captured: "http://localhost:3000/game?seed=sharetest1" — matches current page URL exactly

evidence.network: N/A — clipboard operation, no network request
evidence.note: Used navigator.clipboard.writeText mock to capture clipboard content because headless Chrome denies clipboard read/write permissions. The mock resolved successfully, confirming the app calls writeText with the correct URL.

steps.observed: Captured 25 square labels from original tab

steps.observed: New tab loaded with identical board — all 25 square labels match exactly
All 25 labels match in the same order. Board layout is identical.

assertions.title: Share provides user feedback on success

steps.action: Install clipboard mock (resolves successfully) on fresh page
steps.observed: Mock installed on fresh page load
Button text changed to 'Copied!', aria-label changed to 'Copied!', button gained green styling (border-green-400, bg-green-50, text-green-700)
After 3 seconds, button text is 'Share', aria-label is 'Share', no green/red styling classes present
Screenshot confirms button has reverted to original 'Share' state

evidence.note: FEEDBACK_DURATION in source code is 2000ms. Button reverted to 'Share' well within 3 seconds.

assertions.title: Share copies the full URL including seed

steps.action: Click Share button with clipboard mock installed
steps.expected: Full URL with seed parameter captured

steps.observed: URL is 'http://localhost:3000/game?seed=sharetest1' — contains seed= parameter with full value 'sharetest1', not truncated

steps.action: Verify URL is valid and navigable
steps.expected: URL can be opened in browser
steps.observed: URL was successfully opened in a new tab and produced a valid board (verified in VAL-SH-002)

frictions.description: Headless Chrome denies clipboard read/write permissions by default. navigator.clipboard.writeText() fails with 'Write permission denied' and navigator.clipboard.readText() fails with 'Read permission denied'. This prevented direct clipboard verification.
frictions.resolution: Installed a JS mock of navigator.clipboard.writeText that captures the written URL and resolves successfully, allowing verification of the Share button's clipboard behavior without actual clipboard access.

frictions.description: On first attempt without the clipboard mock, the Share button showed 'Could not copy' error feedback (since real clipboard write failed) then reverted to 'Share' after 2 seconds. This initially made it seem like the button wasn't providing feedback at all.
frictions.resolution: Re-loaded the page and installed the clipboard mock before any Share interaction. This allowed the button to show the 'Copied!' success feedback as intended.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-SH-001 (clipboard copy), VAL-SH-002 (identical board from shared URL), VAL-SH-003 (visible feedback), VAL-SH-004 (temporary feedback), VAL-SH-005 (full URL with seed) all confirmed working. Note: clipboard functionality was verified via JS mock due to headless Chrome clipboard permission restrictions — the actual navigator.clipboard.writeText call was intercepted and its argument verified.
